narrative:
Hubbard Twp A (precinct in Trumbull County) has 972 registered voters, with 54.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 27.1%, a clear Democratic lean of 8.6 percentage points.
